headline: Paychex (PAYX) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Amid a dynamic macro backdrop, our clients' workforce levels remained stable, supported by our solutions that help manage costs and source talent in a tight labor market.  In a highly regulated industry, our compliance depth, advisory expertise, and award-winning platforms provide a clear competitive advantage in navigating a constantly changing and complex regulatory environment.  For many of our clients, we effectively serve as their HR department, managing a foundational part of their business.

The share price is around US$90.61 after a 2.0% decline over the past week, a 0.7% decline over the past month, and a 16.6% decline year to date, with a 34.9% decline over the past year putting recent returns in sharp focus.
